---
title: "Qwen — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos parquets do parser canonico"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, conexao DuckDB, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import json
import pandas as pd
import duckdb
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import plotly.express as px
from itables import init_notebook_mode, show

init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

from src.parsers.quarto_helpers import setup_views_with_manual
PROCESSED = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "Qwen"
con = duckdb.connect()
_views = setup_views_with_manual(
    con, "qwen", PROCESSED,
    ["conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches", "project_metadata", "project_docs"],
)

# Qwen brand: roxo/violeta
SOURCE_COLOR = "#615CED"
SECONDARY = "#8B85F0"
ACCENT = "#3D2A88"
MUTED = "#D1D5DB"


def fmt_pct(n, total):
    pct = n / total * 100 if total else 0
    return f"{n:,}/{total:,} ({pct:.0f}%)"


def show_df(df, **kwargs):
    from IPython.display import display
    display(df.style.hide(axis="index"))


def plotly_bar(x, y, title, color=SOURCE_COLOR, height=350, orientation="v"):
    if orientation == "h":
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(y=x, x=y, marker_color=color, orientation="h"))
    else:
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(x=x, y=y, marker_color=color))
    fig.update_layout(
        title=title, height=height, template="plotly_white",
        margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20),
    )
    return fig
```

# Visao geral

```{python}
#| label: overview

totals = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations) AS conversations,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages) AS messages,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tool_events) AS tool_events,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM branches) AS branches,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_metadata) AS projects
""").df()

range_dt = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        MIN(created_at) AS oldest,
        MAX(created_at) AS newest_created,
        MAX(updated_at) AS newest_updated
    FROM conversations
""").df()

_n_docs = 0
try:
    _n_docs = con.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_docs").fetchone()[0]
except Exception:
    pass

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Tabela": "conversations.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['conversations'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": f"{range_dt['oldest'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d} → {range_dt['newest_created'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d}"},
    {"Tabela": "messages.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['messages'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "tool_events.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['tool_events'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "branches.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['branches'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "project_metadata.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['projects'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "project_docs.parquet", "Rows": f"{_n_docs:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
]))
```

> **Sobre este documento.** Catalogo descritivo dos parquets gerados pelo
> parser canonico do Qwen (`src/parsers/qwen.py`). Apresenta o que esta nos
> dados — schema, cobertura, distribuicoes, preservation. **Nao
> interpreta** conteudo (sem sentiment, clustering, topic detection). Pra
> analise qualitativa, ver projeto `~/Desktop/AI Interaction Analysis/`.
>
> Fonte: pasta unica cumulativa `data/merged/Qwen/` (output de
> `scripts/qwen-sync.py`). Schema canonico v3 cobre: 8 `chat_types` mapeados
> pra `mode` (chat/search/research/dalle), branches via `parentId`/`childrenIds`
> + `currentId`, `pinned`/`archived` cross-platform, projects com
> `custom_instruction` e arquivos anexados (project_docs).

# 1. Dados disponiveis

Cada uma das 4 tabelas + 2 auxiliares tem schema proprio. Aqui mostramos
os campos, sua cobertura nesta base e amostras diversificadas.

## 1.1 Conversations

A tabela de conversas eh a unidade central. Cada linha representa um
chat do Qwen — com seus metadados (titulo, modelo, projeto, datas) e
flags do schema v3 (`is_pinned`, `is_archived`, `is_preserved_missing`,
`last_seen_in_server`).

```{python}
#| label: conv-schema

cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(title) AS title,
        COUNT(model) AS model,
        COUNT(project) AS project,
        COUNT(project_id) AS project_id,
        SUM(is_pinned::INT) AS pinned,
        SUM(is_archived::INT) AS archived,
        SUM(is_temporary::INT) AS temporary,
        SUM(is_preserved_missing::INT) AS preserved,
        COUNT(last_seen_in_server) AS last_seen,
        COUNT(settings_json) AS with_settings
    FROM conversations
""").df()
total = cov["total"].iloc[0]

def conv_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(cov[field].iloc[0]), int(total))

schema_conv = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "ID unico (UUID do servidor)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "source", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Sempre 'qwen'", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "title", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Nome da conv (servidor preenche)", "Cobertura": conv_cov("title")},
    {"Campo": "created_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Quando a conv foi criada (epoch normalizado)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "updated_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Servidor bumpa em rename + pin + archive (validado empirico)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "message_count", "Tipo": "int", "Descricao": "Mensagens (user + assistant)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "model", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Last model usado (Qwen3-Max, Qwen2.5, etc)", "Cobertura": conv_cov("model")},
    {"Campo": "mode", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Mapeado de `chat_type`: chat / search / research / dalle", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "project", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Nome do project parent", "Cobertura": conv_cov("project")},
    {"Campo": "project_id", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "ID do project parent (FK pra project_metadata)", "Cobertura": conv_cov("project_id")},
    {"Campo": "is_pinned", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "True se pinada (cross-platform — campo `pinned` do API)", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['pinned'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "is_archived", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "Schema canonico — Pro/free Qwen NAO persiste flag (no-op upstream, validado 2026-05-01)", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['archived'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "is_temporary", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "Reservado — Qwen nao tem feature efemera observada", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['temporary'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "is_preserved_missing", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "True se conv sumiu do servidor (preservada local)", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['preserved'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "last_seen_in_server", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Data da ultima run em que servidor retornou a conv", "Cobertura": conv_cov("last_seen")},
    {"Campo": "settings_json", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "JSON de `meta.tags` + `feature_config`", "Cobertura": conv_cov("with_settings")},
])
show_df(schema_conv)
```

```{python}
#| label: conv-sample
#| column: page

sample_conv = con.execute("""
    WITH
    pinned_one AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE is_pinned LIMIT 1
    ),
    in_project AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE project_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    standalone AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE project_id IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    research_mode AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE mode = 'research' LIMIT 1
    ),
    search_mode AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE mode = 'search' LIMIT 1
    ),
    dalle_mode AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE mode = 'dalle' LIMIT 1
    ),
    preserved AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE is_preserved_missing LIMIT 1
    ),
    longest AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations ORDER BY message_count DESC LIMIT 1
    )
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (conversation_id)
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 8) AS conv_id,
        substr(title, 1, 40) AS title,
        mode, message_count AS msgs, model,
        project IS NOT NULL AS in_project,
        is_pinned, is_preserved_missing AS preserved,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM pinned_one
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM in_project
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM standalone
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM research_mode
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM search_mode
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM dalle_mode
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM preserved
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM longest
    )
    ORDER BY conversation_id
""").df()
show_df(sample_conv)
```

## 1.2 Messages

Mensagens user/assistant com cobertura especial pra reasoning_content
(`thinking`), token_count, attachments e timestamps de bloco
(start/stop_timestamp).

```{python}
#| label: msg-schema

mcov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(model) AS model,
        COUNT(thinking) AS thinking,
        COUNT(token_count) AS token_count,
        COUNT(attachment_names) AS attachment_names,
        COUNT(asset_paths) AS asset_paths,
        COUNT(citations_json) AS citations_json,
        COUNT(start_timestamp) AS start_ts,
        COUNT(finish_reason) AS finish_reason
    FROM messages
""").df()
mtotal = mcov["total"].iloc[0]

def msg_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(mcov[field].iloc[0]), int(mtotal))

schema_msg = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "UUID da msg", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "branch_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra branches (default `<conv>_main`)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "sequence", "Tipo": "int", "Descricao": "Ordem cronologica dentro da branch", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "role", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "'user' ou 'assistant'", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "content", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Texto consolidado (sem images, sem reasoning)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "model", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Model do assistant (NULL se role=user)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("model")},
    {"Campo": "thinking", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "`reasoning_content` (raro nesta base — feature de modelos QwQ)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("thinking")},
    {"Campo": "token_count", "Tipo": "int?", "Descricao": "Token count quando exposto", "Cobertura": msg_cov("token_count")},
    {"Campo": "attachment_names", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "JSON list de nomes de arquivos uploaded", "Cobertura": msg_cov("attachment_names")},
    {"Campo": "asset_paths", "Tipo": "list[str]?", "Descricao": "Paths locais resolvidos via assets_manifest.json", "Cobertura": msg_cov("asset_paths")},
    {"Campo": "citations_json", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "JSON de search_results citados", "Cobertura": msg_cov("citations_json")},
    {"Campo": "start_timestamp", "Tipo": "timestamp?", "Descricao": "Inicio do bloco no `content_list[*].timestamp`", "Cobertura": msg_cov("start_ts")},
    {"Campo": "stop_timestamp", "Tipo": "timestamp?", "Descricao": "Fim do bloco — latencia derivada", "Cobertura": msg_cov("start_ts")},
    {"Campo": "finish_reason", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "stop / interrupted / etc", "Cobertura": msg_cov("finish_reason")},
])
show_df(schema_msg)
```

```{python}
#| label: msg-sample
#| column: page

sample_msg = con.execute("""
    WITH
    user_msg AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE role='user' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    asst_msg AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE role='assistant' AND thinking IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    with_thinking AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE thinking IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1
    ),
    with_citations AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE citations_json IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1
    ),
    with_assets AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE asset_paths IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1
    )
    SELECT
        substr(message_id, 1, 12) AS msg_id,
        role,
        substr(content, 1, 50) AS content_preview,
        word_count AS wc, model,
        thinking IS NOT NULL AS has_thinking,
        citations_json IS NOT NULL AS has_citations,
        asset_paths IS NOT NULL AS has_assets,
        attachment_names IS NOT NULL AS has_attachments
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM user_msg
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM asst_msg
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM with_thinking
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM with_citations
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM with_assets
    )
""").df()
show_df(sample_msg)
```

## 1.3 Tool Events

Operacoes nao-conversacionais. No Qwen: `image_generation_call` (t2i),
`video_generation_call` (t2v), `artifact_call` (artifacts mode), e
`search_call`/`search_result` quando o chat usa search.

```{python}
#| label: evt-schema

ecov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(tool_name) AS tool_name,
        COUNT(metadata_json) AS metadata_json,
        COUNT(result) AS result
    FROM tool_events
""").df()
etotal = ecov["total"].iloc[0]

def evt_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(ecov[field].iloc[0]), int(etotal))

schema_evt = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "event_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "`<msg_id>_<event_type>` ou similar", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "ID da msg-tool", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "event_type", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "image_generation_call / video_generation_call / search_call / search_result / artifact_call", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "tool_name", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "chat_type origem: t2i / t2v / artifacts / search / deep_research", "Cobertura": evt_cov("tool_name")},
    {"Campo": "metadata_json", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "JSON com chat_type + sub_chat_type + result_count", "Cobertura": evt_cov("metadata_json")},
    {"Campo": "result", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "JSON de search_results em `_result` events", "Cobertura": evt_cov("result")},
])
show_df(schema_evt)
```

```{python}
#| label: evt-sample

sample_evt = con.execute("""
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (event_type)
        event_type,
        tool_name,
        substr(metadata_json, 1, 80) AS metadata_preview
    FROM tool_events
    ORDER BY event_type
""").df()
show_df(sample_evt)
```

## 1.4 Branches

Branches via DAG plano (`parentId` + `childrenIds` + `currentId`). Branch
principal eh a do `currentId` walking back ao root. Forks geram secondary
branches com `parent_branch_id` apontando pra main.

```{python}
#| label: br-schema

bcov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        SUM(is_active::INT) AS active,
        SUM((parent_branch_id IS NULL)::INT) AS main,
        SUM((parent_branch_id IS NOT NULL)::INT) AS forks
    FROM branches
""").df()

schema_br = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "branch_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "`<conv>_main` ou `<conv>_<root_msg_id>`", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "root_message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Primeira msg da branch", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "leaf_message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Ultima msg seguindo children", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "is_active", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "Branch contem `currentId` da conv", "Cobertura": f"{int(bcov['active'].iloc[0]):,} (1 por conv)"},
    {"Campo": "parent_branch_id", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "NULL pra main; aponta pra main em forks", "Cobertura": f"{int(bcov['forks'].iloc[0])} forks / {int(bcov['main'].iloc[0])} main"},
])
show_df(schema_br)
```

# 2. Cobertura e gaps

## 2.1 Convs sem `model`

```{python}
#| label: model-gap

no_model = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS mes,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE model IS NULL) AS sem_model,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE model IS NOT NULL) AS com_model
    FROM conversations
    GROUP BY mes ORDER BY mes
""").df()

fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(x=no_model["mes"], y=no_model["com_model"],
                     name="Com model", marker_color=SOURCE_COLOR))
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(x=no_model["mes"], y=no_model["sem_model"],
                     name="Sem model", marker_color=MUTED))
fig.update_layout(
    barmode="stack", title="Convs por mes — com e sem model",
    height=350, template="plotly_white",
    xaxis=dict(type="category"),
    margin=dict(t=50, b=80, l=40, r=20),
    legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.2),
)
fig.show()
```

## 2.2 Cobertura de thinking (reasoning_content)

`reasoning_content` no Qwen eh condicional — modelos QwQ/Q3-style expoem,
modelos chat regular nao expoem. Uma cobertura baixa eh esperada se a
maioria das convs nao usou esses modelos.

```{python}
#| label: thinking-coverage

think_cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        role,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(thinking) AS com_thinking,
        ROUND(COUNT(thinking) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct
    FROM messages
    GROUP BY role ORDER BY role
""").df()
show_df(think_cov)
```

## 2.3 Token count (accumulated_token_usage)

```{python}
#| label: token-coverage

tok_cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        role,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(token_count) AS com_token,
        ROUND(COUNT(token_count) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct,
        ROUND(AVG(token_count), 0) AS avg_tokens,
        MAX(token_count) AS max_tokens
    FROM messages
    GROUP BY role ORDER BY role
""").df()
show_df(tok_cov)
```

## 2.4 Asset paths e attachments

```{python}
#| label: asset-coverage

ass_cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total_msgs,
        COUNT(asset_paths) AS com_asset_paths,
        COUNT(attachment_names) AS com_attachments,
        ROUND(COUNT(asset_paths) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_assets,
        ROUND(COUNT(attachment_names) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_attach
    FROM messages
""").df()
show_df(ass_cov)
```

# 3. Volumes e distribuicoes

## 3.1 Conversas criadas por mes

```{python}
#| label: conv-timeline

timeline = con.execute("""
    SELECT strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS mes, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations GROUP BY mes ORDER BY mes
""").df()

fig = plotly_bar(x=timeline["mes"], y=timeline["n"],
                 title="Conversations criadas por mes", height=350)
fig.update_xaxes(type="category")
fig.show()
```

## 3.2 Mensagens por role

```{python}
#| label: roles

roles = con.execute("""
    SELECT role, COUNT(*) AS n FROM messages GROUP BY role ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

fig = plotly_bar(x=roles["role"], y=roles["n"], title="Messages por role", height=300)
fig.show()
```

## 3.3 chat_type → mode (4 ativos nesta base)

```{python}
#| label: modes

modes = con.execute("""
    SELECT mode, COUNT(*) AS n FROM conversations
    GROUP BY mode ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

fig = plotly_bar(x=modes["mode"], y=modes["n"],
                 title="Conversations por mode (mapeado de chat_type)",
                 height=300)
fig.show()
show_df(modes)
```

## 3.4 ToolEvents por event_type

```{python}
#| label: tool-events

evts = con.execute("""
    SELECT event_type, tool_name, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM tool_events GROUP BY event_type, tool_name ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

if not evts.empty:
    fig = plotly_bar(x=evts["event_type"], y=evts["n"],
                     title="ToolEvents por event_type", height=300)
    fig.update_xaxes(tickangle=-25)
    fig.show()
show_df(evts)
```

## 3.5 Top models

```{python}
#| label: top-models

top = con.execute("""
    SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS n FROM conversations
    WHERE model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY model ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10
""").df()

if not top.empty:
    fig = plotly_bar(x=top["model"], y=top["n"], title="Top modelos", height=350)
    fig.update_xaxes(tickangle=-25)
    fig.show()
show_df(top)
```

## 3.6 Convs em projects vs standalone

```{python}
#| label: project-split

pcov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN project_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'em project' ELSE 'standalone' END AS tipo,
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations GROUP BY tipo ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

fig = px.pie(pcov, values="n", names="tipo",
             title="Convs em projects vs standalone",
             color_discrete_sequence=[SOURCE_COLOR, MUTED],
             height=350)
fig.update_layout(template="plotly_white", margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20))
fig.show()
show_df(pcov)
```

## 3.7 Distribuicao de tamanho (msgs por conv)

```{python}
#| label: conv-size

sizes = con.execute("""
    SELECT message_count FROM conversations WHERE message_count > 0
""").df()

bins = [0, 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 9999]
labels = ["1", "2", "3-5", "6-10", "11-20", "21-50", "51-100", "100+"]
sizes["bin"] = pd.cut(sizes["message_count"], bins=bins, labels=labels, include_lowest=True)
hist = sizes["bin"].value_counts().reindex(labels).reset_index()
hist.columns = ["bin", "n"]

fig = plotly_bar(x=hist["bin"].astype(str), y=hist["n"],
                 title=f"Distribuicao de msgs por conv (n={len(sizes):,})",
                 height=300)
fig.update_xaxes(title="Msgs por conv")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N convs")
fig.show()
```

## 3.8 Branches: forks por conv

```{python}
#| label: forks

forks = con.execute("""
    SELECT n_branches, COUNT(*) AS n_convs FROM (
        SELECT conversation_id, COUNT(*) AS n_branches
        FROM branches GROUP BY conversation_id
    ) GROUP BY n_branches ORDER BY n_branches
""").df()

fig = plotly_bar(x=forks["n_branches"].astype(str), y=forks["n_convs"],
                 title="Branches por conv (forks count)", height=300)
fig.update_xaxes(title="N branches")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N convs")
fig.show()
```

# 4. Preservation + features distintivas

## 4.1 Pinned (cross-platform)

```{python}
#| label: pinned-detail

pinned_table = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 8) AS conv_id,
        title,
        mode,
        message_count AS msgs,
        model,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
    FROM conversations
    WHERE is_pinned = TRUE
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
""").df()

if not pinned_table.empty:
    show_df(pinned_table)
else:
    print("Nenhuma conv pinada.")
```

## 4.2 Preservation — convs sumidas do servidor

```{python}
#| label: preserved-detail

preserved_table = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 8) AS conv_id,
        title,
        message_count AS msgs,
        strftime(last_seen_in_server, '%Y-%m-%d') AS last_seen,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
    FROM conversations
    WHERE is_preserved_missing = TRUE
    ORDER BY last_seen_in_server DESC
""").df()

if not preserved_table.empty:
    show_df(preserved_table)
else:
    print("Nenhuma conv preservada.")
```

## 4.3 Projects com docs (custom_instruction + arquivos)

Tabela auxiliar `project_metadata` lista projects com custom_instruction
+ contagem de docs. `project_docs` armazena content inline dos arquivos
anexados (imagens, PDFs, txt, code).

```{python}
#| label: projects-overview

proj = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(project_id, 1, 8) AS project_id,
        name,
        files_count,
        custom_instruction IS NOT NULL AS has_custom_instruction,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
    FROM project_metadata
    ORDER BY files_count DESC
""").df()

if not proj.empty:
    show_df(proj)
else:
    print("Sem projects nesta base.")
```

```{python}
#| label: project-docs

docs_count = 0
try:
    docs_count = con.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_docs").fetchone()[0]
except Exception:
    pass

if docs_count > 0:
    docs = con.execute("""
        SELECT
            substr(project_id, 1, 8) AS project_id,
            substr(file_name, 1, 40) AS file_name,
            content_size,
            estimated_token_count AS tokens
        FROM project_docs
        ORDER BY content_size DESC LIMIT 10
    """).df()
    show_df(docs)
else:
    print("Sem project_docs nesta base.")
```

# 5. Limitacoes conhecidas

| Item | Status |
|---|---|
| `is_archived` flag | **upstream no-op em Pro/free** — servidor aceita request mas nao persiste flag. Validado empirico 2026-05-01. Schema canonico tem campo, so nunca True em conta sem Enterprise |
| `share_id` populado | nao testado nesta base (feature existe na UI) |
| Voice / TTS | nao identificado em probe |
| Move to Project (mudanca dinamica) | nao exercitado |
| Folder | `folder_id` no schema, sem valores nesta base |
